raw_input:
Parse the URL into a structured JSON object. Fields: scheme (string), host (string), port (integer — if not given explicitly in the URL, use 443 for https and 80 for http), path (string, starting with '/'), query_params (object mapping each query parameter name to its string value), fragment (string, empty string if none).

URL: 'https://api.example.com:8443/v2/users?limit=20&after=abc&sort=name#results'

Return only the JSON object.
constraints: port is an integer, not a string
query_params is an object, not an array
